title: Prevent stale Telegram update failures from blocking polling delivery
acceptanceCriteria: Repo-local evidence proves that the current silent-Telegram symptom comes from a replayed failing update, not from delivery-mode selection or Telegram token validity.
The bot polling runtime no longer lets one failing update block subsequent updates.
Telegram transport readiness remains about Telegram delivery state, not user-command handler failures.
Regression coverage proves that a failing update does not get replayed forever and that later updates still run.
Verification artifacts for the bounded bot-scope fix are captured in this task bundle.
